title: DDGI — Dynamic Diffuse Global Illumination
description: Covers NVIDIA's Dynamic Diffuse GI (DDGI) probe system: uniformly or adaptively placed irradiance probes that ray trace their environment using DXR, encode results as irradiance and mean depth in a small atlas texture, and provide dynamic diffuse indirect light to any surface via trilinear probe blending. DDGI is the basis for UE5's Lumen diffuse component and is available as a standalone SDK for integration into custom engines. Students will implement DDGI with a uniform probe grid, integrate probe blending into the GP Engine deferred lighting pass, handle probe relighting on dynamic object movement, and measure the temporal stability of the result.
